channel.title: Xiaomi 17T MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 17T MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.311.0.WPTEUXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 17T EEA
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17T EEA

Codename: chagall

Version: OS3.0.311.0.WPTEUXM | 16.0

Size: 9.2 GB

MD5: 7d565e7dce8118a17dad699bbdb043da

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.303.0.WPTMIXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 17T Global
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17T Global

Codename: chagall

Version: OS3.0.303.0.WPTMIXM | 16.0

Size: 10.2 GB

MD5: 836f8af366d369dfe7f0d24e57f29f31

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.302.0.WPTRUXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 17T Russia
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17T Russia

Codename: chagall

Version: OS3.0.302.0.WPTRUXM | 16.0

Size: 9.9 GB

MD5: a3fba4a7e0b4990a176b5abad9aed5f4

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.302.0.WPTIDXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 17T Indonesia
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17T Indonesia

Codename: chagall

Version: OS3.0.302.0.WPTIDXM | 16.0

Size: 9.0 GB

MD5: 681351732521f9908eca269008e3fca5

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.302.0.WPTTRXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 17T Turkey
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17T Turkey

Codename: chagall

Version: OS3.0.302.0.WPTTRXM | 16.0

Size: 9.0 GB

MD5: c0d071bb0ce4a2d60e167bae556a06e9

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.302.0.WPTRUXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 17T Russia
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17T Russia

Codename: chagall

Version: OS3.0.302.0.WPTRUXM | 16.0

Size: 7.3 GB

MD5: a3bde2c46d625480e98906e1e5c04a79

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings

Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions

Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17T EEA

Version: OS3.0.311.0.WPTEUXM | 16.0

Size: 7.5 GB

MD5: 519bbc88fc7cba4bc72abfd685550137

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions

New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes

New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.303.0.WPTMIXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 17T Global
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17T Global

Codename: chagall

Version: OS3.0.303.0.WPTMIXM | 16.0

Size: 7.5 GB

MD5: 4bc308875a09c96c3d1bbc851eb413c3

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings

New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes

New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.306.0.WPTTWXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 17T Taiwan
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17T Taiwan

Codename: chagall

Version: OS3.0.306.0.WPTTWXM | 16.0

Size: 7.3 GB

MD5: 2c2a4f264b7412114c255928c23e529c

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions

New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes

New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.302.0.WPTINXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 17T India
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17T India

Codename: chagall

Version: OS3.0.302.0.WPTINXM | 16.0

Size: 8.2 GB

MD5: c388d745fd97f4aac54e46c71f8000d2

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.304.0.WPTCNXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 17T China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17T China

Codename: chagall

Version: OS3.0.304.0.WPTCNXM | 16.0

Size: 11.1 GB

MD5: e2b944a61b5dadfbab49dcec2ee13242

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Xiaomi HyperIsland:
New: Support for Xiaomi HyperIsland in File Manager, showing real time progress for online files
New: Support for Xiaomi HyperIsland with transit and key cards, including swiping from the Lock screen

Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi:
New: Support for continuous conversations with Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi while holding the Power button

Recorder:
New: Support for generating a summary in the Recorder app, then asking Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi questions about the recording
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Family Guard:
New: The option to view and edit Family Guard settings before you turn on Child mode
Optimization: Saving feature settings when turning off On-device guardianship
Optimization: Screen time stats in Child mode

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: Cloud drive file thumbnails in File Manager displayed incorrectly in some cases
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: An issue where WeChat couldn't access screenshots in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
Fix: An input field display issue when renaming a custom card in Smart cards in Dark mode
Fix: Overlapping buttons in Smart cards in some cases
Optimization: The timeliness and accuracy of weather location updates when your location changes
New: One-tap upload in Gallery to submit your work to the Xiaomi Imagery Global Awards Curated with Leica
*To use this feature, make sure Security is version 12.3.1-260225.0.1 or later, and Mi Store is version 5.49.0 or later
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
New: After Xiaomi phone calls are synced to your iPhone, you can answer them on your iPhone
*On your iPhone, turn on "Sync notifications" for calls in Xiaomi Interconnectivity, and make sure both your Xiaomi phone and iPhone are connected to the internet
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
New: On Mac, Xiaomi Interconnectivity now lets you view Xiaomi Cloud Notes and Gallery
[Privacy and security]
New: With the Passwords app, you can auto-save, autofill, and sync end-to-end encrypted passwords across devices
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.302.0.WPTTRXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 17T Turkey
item.description:

Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.304.0.WPTCNXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 17T China
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17T China

Codename: chagall

Version: OS3.0.304.0.WPTCNXM | 16.0

Size: 8.4 GB

MD5: e0d8aa50c2031811173d67ebac1eae61

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Xiaomi HyperIsland:
New: Support for Xiaomi HyperIsland in File Manager, showing real time progress for online files
New: Support for Xiaomi HyperIsland with transit and key cards, including swiping from the Lock screen

Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi:
New: Support for continuous conversations with Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi while holding the Power button

Recorder:
New: Support for generating a summary in the Recorder app, then asking Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi questions about the recording
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Family Guard:
New: The option to view and edit Family Guard settings before you turn on Child mode
Optimization: Saving feature settings when turning off On-device guardianship
Optimization: Screen time stats in Child mode

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: Cloud drive file thumbnails in File Manager displayed incorrectly in some cases
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: An issue where WeChat couldn't access screenshots in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
Fix: An input field display issue when renaming a custom card in Smart cards in Dark mode
Fix: Overlapping buttons in Smart cards in some cases
Optimization: The timeliness and accuracy of weather location updates when your location changes
New: One-tap upload in Gallery to submit your work to the Xiaomi Imagery Global Awards Curated with Leica
*To use this feature, make sure Security is version 12.3.1-260225.0.1 or later, and Mi Store is version 5.49.0 or later
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
New: After Xiaomi phone calls are synced to your iPhone, you can answer them on your iPhone
*On your iPhone, turn on "Sync notifications" for calls in Xiaomi Interconnectivity, and make sure both your Xiaomi phone and iPhone are connected to the internet
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
New: On Mac, Xiaomi Interconnectivity now lets you view Xiaomi Cloud Notes and Gallery
[Privacy and security]
New: With the Passwords app, you can auto-save, autofill, and sync end-to-end encrypted passwords across devices
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.302.0.WPTINXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 17T India
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17T India

Codename: chagall

Version: OS3.0.302.0.WPTINXM | 16.0

Size: 7.2 GB

MD5: 3f2254d8fd04c9073339a36c62bea642

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WPTCNXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 17T China
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 17T China

Codename: chagall

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WPTCNXM | 16.0

Size: 8.4 GB

MD5: bb1c5c2a07f78955a426edee1b5b2e7c

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Xiaomi HyperIsland:
New: Support for Xiaomi HyperIsland in File Manager, showing real time progress for online files
New: Support for Xiaomi HyperIsland with transit and key cards, including swiping from the Lock screen

Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi:
New: Support for continuous conversations with Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi while holding the Power button

Recorder:
New: Support for generating a summary in the Recorder app, then asking Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi questions about the recording
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Family Guard:
New: The option to view and edit Family Guard settings before you turn on Child mode
Optimization: Saving feature settings when turning off On-device guardianship
Optimization: Screen time stats in Child mode

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: Cloud drive file thumbnails in File Manager displayed incorrectly in some cases
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: An issue where WeChat couldn't access screenshots in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
Fix: An input field display issue when renaming a custom card in Smart cards in Dark mode
Fix: Overlapping buttons in Smart cards in some cases
Optimization: The timeliness and accuracy of weather location updates when your location changes
New: One-tap upload in Gallery to submit your work to the Xiaomi Imagery Global Awards Curated with Leica
*To use this feature, make sure Security is version 12.3.1-260225.0.1 or later, and Mi Store is version 5.49.0 or later
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
New: After Xiaomi phone calls are synced to your iPhone, you can answer them on your iPhone
*On your iPhone, turn on "Sync notifications" for calls in Xiaomi Interconnectivity, and make sure both your Xiaomi phone and iPhone are connected to the internet
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
New: On Mac, Xiaomi Interconnectivity now lets you view Xiaomi Cloud Notes and Gallery
[Privacy and security]
New: With the Passwords app, you can auto-save, autofill, and sync end-to-end encrypted passwords across devices
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup
